name: globalcaos--owntracks-location
description: Real-time phone location tracking via OwnTracks HTTP webhook receiver with named places and distance-based queries. Use when: (1) user asks "where am I?", (2) storing named locations (home, gym, work), (3) querying nearby places by distance, (4) checking location history. Requires: OwnTracks app on phone, Tailscale or LAN connectivity, Node.js 22+, better-sqlite3.
